perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split-screen comparison: the left side shows another creator eating a yellow substance, while the main female creator on the right opens a beverage can and reacts with surprise. (2) She then unboxes a large styrofoam container containing a packaged raw fish liver and slices of sashimi. (3) She wipes the liver with paper towels to clean it and proceeds to cut it into smaller pieces using a yellow knife. (4) She tastes a piece of the raw liver after dipping it in a small bowl of salt and oil, followed by an expressive reaction of confusion and slight disgust. (5) She switches to eating the pink fish slices dipped in a red sauce, showing visible enjoyment and a more positive facial expression. (6) She attempts to eat the liver again, this time adding a spicy sauce on top. (7) The final scene shows her sitting on the floor, eating potato chips while a small white dog looks on.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop music with female vocals begins immediately. A female voice provides continuous Mandarin narration in an excited and curious tone. (2) The sounds of unboxing, plastic rustling, and the 'clack' of a knife against a plate are clear. (3) The audio shifts to include ASMR-style chewing sounds when the creator eats. (4) Vocalizations of surprise and soft laughter are heard alongside the background music. (5) In the final moments, the sound of a dog crunching on a snack replaces most of the narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Top title: '韓網爆紅神奇食材 黃金生鴨血?' (Korean internet viral magical ingredient: Golden raw duck blood?). (2) Hook text: '超多韓國網美生吃黃色的魚肝?!' (So many Korean internet celebrities eat yellow fish liver raw?!). (3) Decorative variety-show style text like '實驗歐膩' (Experimental Unnie), '感覺好奇怪' (Feels very strange), '混亂' (Confused), and '當機' (System crash/Frozen) appear to emphasize emotional reactions. (4) Continuous functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the spoken narration.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Unboxing -> Preparation -> Tasting & Reaction -> Comparison -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 1 additional female visible in a small insert video at the start.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a black casual top initially and later a white textured sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor home setting with a grey sofa, a laptop on a desk, and a wooden table used for food preparation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Intro -> Process -> Climax -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an adventurous food review and mukbang where the creator tests a trending and exotic Korean food item: raw stingray liver. She compares the liver to 'butter mixed with avocado' and highlights the contrast between the liver and the stingray sashimi to entertain her audience with a 'brave' culinary challenge.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-intensity variety-show captions, extreme close-up reaction shots, and the inclusion of a pet dog in the outro.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes popular short-form content techniques like the split-screen 'duet' hook and dense text overlays to maintain high engagement.
